
```{r}

library(tidyr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

exp_line_factor <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")
sampling_freq <- 2
end_psg <- 1000

data <- read.csv("/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/src/analysis/neutral-sim/final.0.csv", header = T)


fixed_count_list <- list()
fixed_count <- c()


for (i in 1:4){
  exp_line <- exp_line_factor[i]

  for (psg in seq(2,end_psg,sampling_freq)){
      
      # print(psg)

      # print("#######")
      data <- read.csv(paste0("/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/src/analysis/neutral-sim/", exp_line, "/samples/sample_",psg,"_0.csv"), header = T)

      tab <- table(unlist(strsplit(rep(data$haplotype, data$count), ";")))
      tab <- tab[names(tab) != "wt"]
      if (length(tab) == 0){
          fixed_count <- append(fixed_count, 0)
          # print(0)
          next
      }
      counts <- as.numeric(tab)
      pos <- as.numeric(sapply(strsplit(names(tab), ":"), "[[", 1)) + 1
      ref <- sapply(strsplit(sapply(strsplit(names(tab), ":"), "[[", 2), "->"), "[[", 1)
      alt <- sapply(strsplit(sapply(strsplit(names(tab), ":"), "[[", 2), "->"), "[[", 2)


      df <- data.frame(Position = pos, Ref = ref, Alt = alt, Count = counts)
      df <- df[order(df$Position),]

      fixed_count <- append(fixed_count, sum((df$Count/sum(data$count)) == 1))
      # print(sum((df$Count/sum(data$count)) == 1))
  }
  fixed_count_list[[exp_line]] <- fixed_count
  fixed_count <- c()
}


# Convert list to data frame
fixed_count_df <- as.data.frame(fixed_count_list)

# Rename columns 
colnames(fixed_count_df) <- exp_line_factor
head(fixed_count_df)


# Add time column (row index)
fixed_count_df$passage <- seq(1,end_psg/2,1)

# Reshape data from wide to long format
fixed_count_df_long <- melt(fixed_count_df, id.vars = "passage", variable.name = "exp_line", value.name = "mut_count")
fixed_count_df_long$group <- "Simulation"
fixed_count_df_long$mut_count <- round(fixed_count_df_long$mut_count/3)
head(fixed_count_df_long)

# Plot using ggplot2
ggplot(fixed_count_df_long, aes(x = passage, y = Fixed_count, group = exp_line, color = exp_line)) +
  geom_line(size = 1, alpha = 0.5) +  # Line plot
  geom_point(size = 2) + # Add points for visibility
  labs(title = "Fixed Variant Count Over Time (Neutral Simulation)",
       x = "Transfer",
       y = "Mutation Count",
       color = "Virus Line") +
  theme_minimal()


```
